internalName: Sea Cloud View Panwa — The Shoreline C2
place: Ao Makham, Cape Panwa, Wichit, Mueang Phuket District, Phuket 83000, Thailand
title: Beachfront Five-Bedroom Sea-View Pool Villa - Cape Panwa
blurb: A five-bedroom-plus-flex-room Shoreline villa in an ultra-exclusive seven-villa development above Ao Makham, Cape Panwa — set closest to the water with direct private beach access and uninterrupted Andaman sea views. Tropical Modern design across 778 m² on a 1,056 m² plot, with a private infinity-edge pool. Sold fully furnished, freehold or leasehold; completion 2026. ฿148,500,000.
detail:
One of just seven private hillside villas in an ultra-low-density development perched above Ao Makham at Cape Panwa, on Phuket's tranquil south-eastern tip, where the Andaman Sea fills the horizon. This is a Shoreline villa — among those set closest to the water, with direct private access to the beach and wide, sea-facing layouts built for living with the ocean as part of daily life.

Designed in a distinctive Tropical Modern style that blends into its lush hillside, the five-bedroom-plus-flex-room home runs to 778 m² of built area on a 1,056 m² plot. Floor-to-ceiling windows and expansive terraces draw the panorama inside, opening to a private infinity-edge pool that appears to spill toward the sea. Interiors are crafted around natural light and fluid indoor-outdoor transitions, with premium materials and timeless finishes throughout, plus a separate flex room.

The residence comes fully furnished and is offered freehold or leasehold, with completion in 2026. Every villa has its own private parking and 24-hour security across the gated, detached community.

The setting is as practical as it is serene: around five minutes to the pier for island-hopping and yachting, and just ten to fifteen minutes to Phuket Town. Asking ฿148,500,000 including furniture.

features.l: Five bedrooms + flex room · seven baths
5 min to pier · 10–15 min to Phuket Town
